summary: Comprehensive testing of Grade 5 Scholarship Exam Platform completed successfully. Backend APIs (100% pass rate) and Frontend UI (100% pass rate) are fully functional. All 5 role logins work, language switching works across EN/SI/TA, admin dashboard with 4 tabs loads correctly with statistics, batch management and user management features operational.
passed_tests: API Health Check - Version 2.0.0 operational
Admin Login (admin@exam.lk/admin123) - SUCCESS
Student Login (student@test.lk/pass123) - SUCCESS
Teacher Login (teacher@test.lk/pass123) - SUCCESS
Parent Login (parent@test.lk/pass123) - SUCCESS
Marker Login (marker@exam.lk/marker123) - SUCCESS
Invalid credentials rejection - SUCCESS
Language Switcher - English to Sinhala - SUCCESS
Language Switcher - English to Tamil - SUCCESS
Language Switcher - Back to English - SUCCESS
AcademicLogo shows correct EN text: EDUCATION REFORMS BUREAU
AcademicLogo shows correct SI text: විභාග ඇගැයුම් කාර්යාංශය
AcademicLogo shows correct TA text: கல்வி சீர்திருத்த அலுவலகம்
Admin Dashboard loads with Overview tab showing statistics
Admin Dashboard has 4 tabs: Overview, User Management, Batches, Teaching
Admin statistics API returns total_students, total_parents, total_markers, total_exams, total_batches, total_teaching_sessions
Admin User Management tab shows list of users with search and role filter
Admin can open Add User modal with form fields
Admin Batches tab shows existing batches with Create Batch button
Admin Teaching tab shows MCQ teaching session information
Student Dashboard loads showing available exams (60 MCQ, 60 minutes)
Teacher Dashboard loads showing exam management interface
GET /api/batches - lists batches - SUCCESS
POST /api/batches/create - creates batch - SUCCESS
GET /api/admin/statistics - returns stats including total_batches and total_teaching_sessions - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: No seed data created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the review request are working correctly. Backend routing is now fixed (was returning 404 in previous iterations). The app uses i18next for translations with 3 languages: en, si, ta. Admin dashboard has 4 tabs with proper data-testid attributes. All role dashboards load correctly with appropriate content. Batch management and teaching session features are operational.
